title: × elyhordeum langei
intro: × Elyhordeum langei, also known as a hybrid of einkorn wheat (Elymus spp.) and Hordeum (barley), is a type of ancient grain that has been used for its medicinal and nutritional properties. The medicinal properties of × Elyhordeum langei include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant, making it beneficial for digestive issues and immune system support. The health benefits of consuming × Elyhordeum langei include improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and increased energy levels due to its high nutritional content, including fiber, vitamins, and minerals. Herbal preparations of × Elyhordeum langei can be made into teas, infusions, and supplements to utilize its medicinal and nutritional properties.
